pipeline._note: White-noise stimulus. type vector size1 2 -> both elements get the same white value; aylp_alsa scale [1,0] routes element 0 to L, mutes R. amplitude 0.3: broadband drive that the plant low-passes, so beam motion stays small/on-sensor. seed fixed for reproducibility (recorded anyway).
SOUNDCARD actuator, low-latency threaded (0.083 ms queue). scale [1,0]: drive ONLY L; R muted (not connected). rt_prio 80 needs privilege.
Piplate PARKED: scale 0 drives nothing, offset 2 holds the DC bias so the beam sits on-sensor while the soundcard jitters y.
~100000 frames (~27 s at ~3728 Hz) then stop.
